name: interactive-story-game
description: A separated frontend/backend LLM interactive story web game.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @story-game/api" "npm run dev -w @story-game/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @story-game/shared && npm run build -w @story-game/api && npm run build -w @story-game/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @story-game/shared && npm run typecheck -w @story-game/api && npm run typecheck -w @story-game/web
